meaning: n.楔形榫头vt.与...吻合,用鸠尾榫接合vi.吻合
examples: I'm following up a few things that might dovetail.
It is important that we dovetail our respective interests.
And so, of course, I had to dovetail with that.
For one thing, the agencies keep their own lists of investigations, which do not completely dovetail.
Other finds made beyond the large and well-preserved Al Magar dovetail with current Arabian passions.
